memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_ct_cb::connected) (struct bt_conn *conn, struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct)
memberdef.name: connected

briefdescription.para: An AVRCP CT connection has been established.

detaileddescription.para: This callback notifies the application of an avrcp connection, i.e., an AVCTP L2CAP connection.

parameterdescription.para: Connection object.
AVRCP CT connection object.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_ct_cb::disconnected) (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct)
memberdef.name: disconnected

briefdescription.para: An AVRCP CT connection has been disconnected.

detaileddescription.para: This callback notifies the application that an avrcp connection has been disconnected.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_ct_cb::browsing_connected) (struct bt_conn *conn, struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct)
memberdef.name: browsing_connected

briefdescription.para: An AVRCP CT browsing connection has been established.

detaileddescription.para: This callback notifies the application of an avrcp browsing connection, i.e., an AVCTP browsing L2CAP connection.

parameterdescription.para: Connection object.
AVRCP CT connection object.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_ct_cb::browsing_disconnected) (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct)
memberdef.name: browsing_disconnected

briefdescription.para: An AVRCP CT browsing connection has been disconnected.

detaileddescription.para: This callback notifies the application that an avrcp browsing connection has been disconnected.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_ct_cb::get_caps) (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: get_caps

detaileddescription.para: Called when the get capabilities process is completed.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the response.

The status code returned by the TG, indicating the result of the operation, bt_avrcp_status_t. Typically corresponds to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_* values such as BT_AVRCP_STATUS_SUCCESS or BT_AVRCP_STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER.

The response buffer containing the BT_AVRCP_PDU_ID_GET_CAPS payload returned by the TG. The application can parse this payload according to the format, defined in bt_avrcp_get_caps_rsp. If status is in the range BT_AVRCP_STATUS_INVALID_COMMAND to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_ADDRESSED_PLAYER_CHANGED, and is not equal to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_OPERATION_COMPLETED, it indicates that the AVRCP response code is an AV/C REJECTED response, and buf is NULL. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_ct_cb::unit_info_rsp) (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, struct bt_avrcp_unit_info_rsp *rsp)
memberdef.name: unit_info_rsp

detaileddescription.para: Called when the get unit info process is completed.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the response.
The response for UNIT INFO command.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_ct_cb::subunit_info_rsp) (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, struct bt_avrcp_subunit_info_rsp *rsp)
memberdef.name: subunit_info_rsp

detaileddescription.para: Called when the get subunit info process is completed.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the response.
The response for SUBUNIT INFO command.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_ct_cb::passthrough_rsp) (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, bt_avrcp_rsp_t result, const struct bt_avrcp_passthrough_rsp *rsp)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, bt_avrcp_rsp_t result, const struct bt_avrcp_passthrough_rsp *rsp)
memberdef.name: passthrough_rsp

detaileddescription.para: Called when a passthrough response is received.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the response.
The result of the operation.
The response for PASS THROUGH command.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_ct_cb::set_browsed_player) (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: set_browsed_player

detaileddescription.para: Called when the set browsed player process is completed.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the response.

The response buffer containing the set browsed player response data. If the operation is successful, the application can parse this payload according to the format defined in bt_avrcp_set_browsed_player_rsp. If status indicates a reject error or operation not completed, buf only contains a single status byte. Note that the data is encoded in big-endian format.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_ct_cb::get_folder_items) (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: get_folder_items

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Get Folder Items process is completed.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the response.

The response buffer containing the Get Folder Items response data. If the operation is successful, the application can parse this payload according to the format defined in bt_avrcp_get_folder_items_rsp. If status indicates a reject error or operation not completed, buf only contains a single status byte. Note that the data is encoded in big-endian format.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_ct_cb::change_path) (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, uint32_t num_items)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, uint32_t num_items)
memberdef.name: change_path

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Change Path process is completed.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the response.
Operation status (see bt_avrcp_status_t).
Number of items in the new folder (valid only if status is BT_AVRCP_STATUS_OPERATION_COMPLETED).

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_ct_cb::get_item_attrs) (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: get_item_attrs

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Get Item Attributes process is completed.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the response.

The response buffer containing the Get Item Attributes response data. If the operation is successful, the application can parse this payload according to the format defined in bt_avrcp_get_item_attrs_rsp. If status indicates a reject error or operation not completed, buf only contains a single status byte. Note that the data is encoded in big-endian format.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_ct_cb::get_total_number_of_items) (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: get_total_number_of_items

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Get Total Number Of Items process is completed.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the response.

The response buffer containing the Get Total Number Of Items response data. If the operation is successful, the application can parse this payload according to the format defined bt_avrcp_get_total_number_of_items_rsp. If status indicates a reject error or operation not completed, buf only contains a single status byte. Note that the data is encoded in big-endian format.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_ct_cb::search) (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: search

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Search process is completed.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the response.

The response buffer containing the Search response data. If the operation is successful, the application can parse this payload according to the format defined in bt_avrcp_search_rsp. If status indicates a reject error or operation not completed, buf only contains a single status byte. Note that the data is encoded in big-endian format.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_ct_cb::browsing_general_reject) (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status)
memberdef.name: browsing_general_reject

briefdescription.para: Callback function for browsing channel general reject responses.

detaileddescription.para: Called when a general reject response is received on the browsing channel.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the response.
The status code indicating the reason for rejection, see bt_avrcp_status_t.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_ct_cb::notification) (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, uint8_t event_id, struct bt_avrcp_event_data *data)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, uint8_t event_id, struct bt_avrcp_event_data *data)
memberdef.name: notification

briefdescription.para: Callback function for Event Notification response (CT).

detaileddescription.para: Called when the AVRCP Target (TG) sends a response to a previously registered event (Register Notification). This callback reports the event type, the response phase (e.g., Interim), and the event-specific payload.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP Controller (CT) connection context.
Transaction label that correlates this notification with the original Register Notification request.
TG status/phase code (BT_AVRCP_STATUS_*). Typically BT_AVRCP_STATUS_SUCCESS for an interim notification. Error codes may be returned for invalid parameters or unsupported events.
The AVRCP event identifier. bt_avrcp_event_data This corresponds to one of the AVRCP event types such as EVENT_PLAYBACK_STATUS_CHANGED, EVENT_TRACK_CHANGED, etc.
Pointer to bt_avrcp_event_data structure containing the event-specific data. The content of the union depends on the event_id.

simplesect.para: This callback is only invoked for interim notifications and error statuses from the TG. For CHANGED event notifications, the event must first be registered using bt_avrcp_notify_changed_cb_t.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_ct_cb::list_player_app_setting_attrs) (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: list_player_app_setting_attrs

detaileddescription.para: Called when the response for LIST_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_ATTRS is received.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the request.

The status code returned by the TG, indicating the result of the operation, bt_avrcp_status_t. Typically corresponds to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_* values such as BT_AVRCP_STATUS_SUCCESS or BT_AVRCP_STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER.

The response buffer containing the LIST_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_ATTRS payload returned by the TG. The application can parse this payload according to the format defined in bt_avrcp_list_player_app_setting_attrs_rsp. If status is in the range BT_AVRCP_STATUS_INVALID_COMMAND to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_ADDRESSED_PLAYER_CHANGED, and is not equal to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_OPERATION_COMPLETED, it indicates that the AVRCP response code is an AV/C REJECTED response, and buf is NULL. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_ct_cb::list_player_app_setting_vals) (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: list_player_app_setting_vals

detaileddescription.para: Called when the response for LIST_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_VALS is received.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the request.

The status code returned by the TG, indicating the result of the operation, bt_avrcp_status_t. Typically corresponds to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_* values such as BT_AVRCP_STATUS_SUCCESS or BT_AVRCP_STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER.

The response buffer containing the LIST_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_VALS payload returned by the TG. The application can parse this payload according to the format defined in bt_avrcp_list_player_app_setting_vals_rsp. If status is in the range BT_AVRCP_STATUS_INVALID_COMMAND to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_ADDRESSED_PLAYER_CHANGED, and is not equal to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_OPERATION_COMPLETED, it indicates that the AVRCP response code is an AV/C REJECTED response, and buf is NULL. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_ct_cb::get_curr_player_app_setting_val) (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: get_curr_player_app_setting_val

detaileddescription.para: Called when the response for GET_CURR_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_VAL is received.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the request.

The status code returned by the TG, indicating the result of the operation, bt_avrcp_status_t. Typically corresponds to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_* values such as BT_AVRCP_STATUS_SUCCESS or BT_AVRCP_STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER.

The response buffer containing the GET_CURR_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_VAL payload returned by the TG. The application can parse this payload according to the format defined in bt_avrcp_get_curr_player_app_setting_val_rsp. If status is in the range BT_AVRCP_STATUS_INVALID_COMMAND to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_ADDRESSED_PLAYER_CHANGED, and is not equal to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_OPERATION_COMPLETED, it indicates that the AVRCP response code is an AV/C REJECTED response, and buf is NULL. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_ct_cb::set_player_app_setting_val) (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status)
memberdef.name: set_player_app_setting_val

detaileddescription.para: Called when the response for SET_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_VAL is received.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the request.

The status code returned by the TG, indicating the result of the operation, bt_avrcp_status_t. Typically corresponds to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_* values such as BT_AVRCP_STATUS_SUCCESS or BT_AVRCP_STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_ct_cb::get_player_app_setting_attr_text) (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: get_player_app_setting_attr_text

detaileddescription.para: Called when the response for GET_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_ATTR_TEXT is received.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the request.

The status code returned by the TG, indicating the result of the operation, bt_avrcp_status_t. Typically corresponds to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_* values such as BT_AVRCP_STATUS_SUCCESS or BT_AVRCP_STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER.

The response buffer containing the GET_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_ATTR_TEXT payload returned by the TG, formatted as bt_avrcp_get_player_app_setting_attr_text_rsp. If status is in the range BT_AVRCP_STATUS_INVALID_COMMAND to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_ADDRESSED_PLAYER_CHANGED, and is not equal to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_OPERATION_COMPLETED, it indicates that the AVRCP response code is an AV/C REJECTED response, and buf is NULL. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: get_player_app_setting_val_text

detaileddescription.para: Called when the response for GET_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_VAL_TEXT is received.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the request.

The status code returned by the TG, indicating the result of the operation, bt_avrcp_status_t. Typically corresponds to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_* values such as BT_AVRCP_STATUS_SUCCESS or BT_AVRCP_STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER.

The response buffer containing the GET_PLAYER_APP_SETTING_VAL_TEXT payload returned by the TG, formatted as bt_avrcp_get_player_app_setting_val_text_rsp. If status is in the range BT_AVRCP_STATUS_INVALID_COMMAND to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_ADDRESSED_PLAYER_CHANGED, and is not equal to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_OPERATION_COMPLETED, it indicates that the AVRCP response code is an AV/C REJECTED response, and buf is NULL. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_ct_cb::inform_displayable_char_set) (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status)
memberdef.name: inform_displayable_char_set

detaileddescription.para: Called when the response for INFORM_DISPLAYABLE_CHAR_SET is received.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the request.

The status code returned by the TG, indicating the result of the operation, bt_avrcp_status_t. Typically corresponds to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_* values such as BT_AVRCP_STATUS_SUCCESS or BT_AVRCP_STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_ct_cb::inform_batt_status_of_ct) (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status)
memberdef.name: inform_batt_status_of_ct

detaileddescription.para: Called when the response for INFORM_BATT_STATUS_OF_CT is received.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the request.

The status code returned by the TG, indicating the result of the operation, bt_avrcp_status_t. Typically corresponds to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_* values such as BT_AVRCP_STATUS_SUCCESS or BT_AVRCP_STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_ct_cb::set_absolute_volume) (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, uint8_t absolute_volume)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, uint8_t absolute_volume)
memberdef.name: set_absolute_volume

briefdescription.para: Callback function for Set Absolute Volume response (CT).

detaileddescription.para: Called when the Set Absolute Volume response is received from the TG.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the response.

The status code returned by the TG, indicating the result of the operation, bt_avrcp_status_t. Typically corresponds to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_* values such as BT_AVRCP_STATUS_SUCCESS or BT_AVRCP_STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER.
The absolute volume value (0x00-0x7F).

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_ct_cb::get_element_attrs) (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: get_element_attrs

detaileddescription.para: Called when the response for GET_ELEMENT_ATTRS is received.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the request.

The status code returned by the TG, indicating the result of the operation, bt_avrcp_status_t. Typically corresponds to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_* values such as BT_AVRCP_STATUS_SUCCESS or BT_AVRCP_STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER.

The response buffer containing the GET_ELEMENT_ATTRS payload returned by the TG, formatted as bt_avrcp_get_element_attrs_rsp. If status is in the range BT_AVRCP_STATUS_INVALID_COMMAND to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_ADDRESSED_PLAYER_CHANGED, and is not equal to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_OPERATION_COMPLETED, it indicates that the AVRCP response code is an AV/C REJECTED response, and buf is NULL. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

memberdef.definition: void(* bt_avrcp_ct_cb::get_play_status) (struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_avrcp_ct *ct, uint8_t tid, uint8_t status, struct net_buf *buf)
memberdef.name: get_play_status

detaileddescription.para: Called when the response for GET_PLAY_STATUS is received.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the request.

The status code returned by the TG, indicating the result of the operation, bt_avrcp_status_t. Typically corresponds to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_* values such as BT_AVRCP_STATUS_SUCCESS or BT_AVRCP_STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER.

The response buffer containing the GET_PLAY_STATUS payload returned by the TG, formatted as bt_avrcp_get_play_status_rsp. If status is in the range BT_AVRCP_STATUS_INVALID_COMMAND to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_ADDRESSED_PLAYER_CHANGED, and is not equal to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_OPERATION_COMPLETED, it indicates that the AVRCP response code is an AV/C REJECTED response, and buf is NULL. Note that all multi-octet fields are encoded in big-endian format.

The status code returned by the TG, indicating the result of the operation. bt_avrcp_status_t. Typically corresponds to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_* values such as BT_AVRCP_STATUS_SUCCESS or BT_AVRCP_STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER.

The status code returned by the TG, indicating the result of the operation. bt_avrcp_status_t. Typically corresponds to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_* values such as BT_AVRCP_STATUS_SUCCESS or BT_AVRCP_STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER.

memberdef.name: add_to_now_playing

detaileddescription.para: Called when the response for ADD_TO_NOW_PLAYING is received.

parameterdescription.para: AVRCP CT connection object.
The transaction label of the request.

The status code returned by the TG, indicating the result of the operation. bt_avrcp_status_t. Typically corresponds to BT_AVRCP_STATUS_* values such as BT_AVRCP_STATUS_SUCCESS or BT_AVRCP_STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER.
